item.title: Parallel 宣布与 Google Cloud 合作，在 Gemini 企业代理平台上提供代理 Web 搜索
item.summary: PALO ALTO, Calif., July 16, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Parallel (parallel.ai), the company building search infrastructure for the agentic web, today announced product integration with Google Cloud that brings Parallel's agentic web search to Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
